theScene: From what you can see, the story of {i}Fertilia Fertilia!{/i} is that you're a kunoichi infiltrator sent to the human continent to sneak into a highly secure human facilities and make out with all the treasure they contain.

In addition to grabbing said treasure, you must make sure not to get caught, which implies avoiding not only increasingly meddlesome guards, but also timed vents of knockout gas which can instantly incapacitate you, resulting in your immediate capture and the end of your career.

Despite the serious-sounding plot, the game itself looks quite colorful and light-hearted, featuring simple but cutesy graphics and music, and a move-by-move gameplay meant to let you take your time to analyze your available routes and your pursuers' patterns, so that you can coolly devise the best strategy to elude them and accomplish your objectives.

All in all, differences in premise, characters, and setting notwithstanding, you feel like this game should not be too different from your traversal of the Labyrinth, the goal being roughly the same: pick up important items, make it to the exit, and don't get caught by a variety of pursuers, which are as follows:

{b}Patrolmen{/b} are in {color=#FFFD9B}yellow{/color} and carry a spear. They are drilled and disciplined to the point of obtuseness, and will {i}always{/i} follow a set pattern.
{b}Soldiers{/b} are in {color=#FF7852}red{/color} and use a sword and shield. These spirited protectors will rush for you through the most direct route, and are thus hard to shake off, but predictable.

{b}Wizards{/b} are in {color=#67CCFF}blue{/color} and carry a staff of power. These eccentric magic users follow no set pattern and can act unpredictably, which can be both a boon and a curse!
{b}Rogues{/b} are in {color=#26A31E}green{/color} and wield two knives. They are crafty and clever, and will try to anticipate your moves and cut you off. Watch out for their pincer maneuvers!

And finally, {b}Skirmishers{/b} are in {color=#FF96DC}pink{/color} and have a whip. These playful humans like to toy with their quarry: they'll stick to you but will rarely directly approach you, instead wandering your surroundings seemingly at random to keep you under pressure.
This concludes {i}Fertilia Fertilia!{/i}'s rundown. Good luck on your path to becoming a True Kunoichi!
As you go to use the Arcade machine, you realize you don't actually have enough money to play...
Your mission isn't complete yet! You can't leave right now!
That's the last of the treasure! Now, time to leave before you get caught!
You got the key from the guardroom! Now, you just need to get out of here!
Upon inserting the required Eros into the machine, the screen flickers as the game immediately starts, running you through an introductory briefing while the music changes to a sneaky-sounding one...

{b}Mission 1{/b} - You have infiltrated deep into Fertilian territory, and must raid a treasure depot to bring back gold, jewels, and other valuables back to Lucidia... and most importantly, cripple the humans' resources! You must avoid getting caught at all costs, or your mission will be an immediate failure. Also, keep in mind that it won't be long before the guards realize you're here and start looking for you. Good luck!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 1 complete!{/b} You escaped with the humans' treasure without a hitch! How did you carry it all? Kunoichi trade secrets!

10 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to the next stage!

{b}Mission 2{/b} - Your next assignment is to infiltrate a castle, starting with sneaking through a derelict half-abandoned section of the compound to reach an entrance into the keep's catacombs, all the while pilfering anything of value on your way. The head guard on duty here is apparently getting in on years and slow to act, so if you move quickly, you might be able to get in and out without attracting trouble. Good luck!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 2 complete!{/b} You escaped with the humans' treasure without a hitch!

25 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to the next stage!

{b}Mission 3{/b} - Your next objective is to slip through the castle's catacombs while picking up any treasure lying around. This far in, there's no regular patrols, but three elite guards are stationed in the area and will set out after you in short order. Good luck!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 3 complete!{/b} You escaped with the humans' treasure without a hitch!

50 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to the next stage!

{b}Mission 4{/b} - Now, you must sneak right into the castle itself and grab all you can! You're definitely not dealing with rank-and-file grunts anymore: this time, four of the kingdom's finest will be after you. Good luck!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 4 complete!{/b} You escaped with the humans' treasure without a hitch!

50 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to the next stage!
{b}Mission 5{/b} - You must now escape back through the catacombs without getting caught by the alerted guards! Get the key from the now messy guardroom and reach the exit!!!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 5 complete! Total victory!!!{/b}

100 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while... the screen shifts to the next stage?
{b}Mission 1 - True Kunoichi Mode{/b} - Do you have what it takes to be a True Kunoichi? Starting back from your first mission, do it all again, this time with limited sight! Good luck!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 1 - True Kunoichi Mode - complete!{/b} You escaped with the humans' treasure without a hitch!

30 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to the next stage!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 2 - True Kunoichi Mode - complete!{/b} You escaped with the humans' treasure without a hitch!

70 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to the next stage!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 3 - True Kunoichi Mode - complete!{/b} You escaped with the humans' treasure without a hitch!

100 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to the next stage!
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 4 - True Kunoichi Mode - complete!{/b} You escaped with the humans' treasure without a hitch!

150 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to the next stage!
{b}Mission 5 - Final Stage - True Kunoichi Mode{/b} - Are you a True Kunoichi?
You're at your entry and exit point for the mission...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.

{b}Mission 5 - True Kunoichi Mode - complete! Congratulations! You are a True Kunoichi and the savior of Lucidia!!!{/b}

250 tickets whirr out of the machine for you to collect while the screen shifts to a brief credits sequence, complete with a little animation of your kunoichi being lauded and praised back at her dojo.
Then the game bloops right back to the start screen, leaving you to consider what to do next. Maybe play again, this time to beat the game in record time?
